rules.name: svelte-runes-no-legacy-reactive-edit
rules.evidence: Follow existing Svelte 5 runes patterns (no legacy reactive statements)

rules.name: svelte-runes-no-legacy-reactive-write
rules.evidence: Follow existing Svelte 5 runes patterns (no legacy reactive statements)

uncompilable: Use TypeScript for all components with proper type imports — 특정 액션에 묶기 힘든 general coding style
Component props should be properly typed interfaces — general coding style
All API responses follow APIResponse<T> interface with success/error structure — 구조적 컨벤션, 신뢰할 만한 액션 결합 패턴 없음
All new features should have Playwright E2E tests — 단일 tool call에 묶기 힘든 워크플로 가이드
Development Workflow 순서(dev → check → lint → deploy → Playwright test) — 단일 액션 트리거가 아닌 일반 프로세스
Deployment reminder to run build+deploy 'when you are done making changes' — '완료 시점'의 명확한 tool-call 경계 없음
Update DEVELOPMENT.md task status if applicable — 조건부 워크플로 단계, 액션 특정 불가
